Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20302 0 0}{f 5 21 1 160}Hey, what'll ya ha— Uh, wait a minute. Aren't you a little too young to be in here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}...Well, I guess you can stay if you don't cause any trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20301 0 0}{f 5 21 1 160}What? You want a drink? You're underage, aren't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}...Oh, it's for the monk upstairs, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}So you say... Look, I'm busy here, and something like this could really get me in trouble.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20304 0 0}{f 5 21 1 160}Okay, how about this? Can you go around and take everyone's orders?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}If you do that, I'll bring a drink upstairs for him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}You seem to come by a lot... Maybe I'll hire you if we need an extra hand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}That monk's not here today. He doesn't usually come on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Wednesdays.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}He's probably busy holding services or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}Like I said, I want you to go around and take everyone's orders.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}If you can do that, then I'll go ahead and bring him a drink.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}Like I said before, I want you to go around and take everyone's orders.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}If you can do that, then I'll go ahead and bring him a drink.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20301 0 0}{f 5 21 1 160}Oh, it's you. Getting another drink for that monk?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 160}If you've got an order, I can get it ready for him right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20305 0 0}{f 5 21 1 160}Got it. Go ahead and let him know it's coming.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20304 0 0}{f 5 21 1 160}Oh, really? All right, well, let me know when he's ready to order.[n]{f 1 1}
